1.name: Confer with the Blade
1.description: See events and informations that have transpired around a weapon.
references: Clanbook: Assamite Revised Pg. 74-76
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 441-442

1.name: Cradlesong
1.description: Sense any supernatural pacts or spiritual ties, including the Blood Bond , that bind a target
references: The Black Hand: A Guide to the Tal'Mahe'Ra Pg. 86-87

1.name: Curse of Lifeless Mien
1.description: Curse a mortal to appear sinister and withdrawn

1.name: Humiliation
1.description: Cause a victim to have bad luck in its next action
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 44-45
Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 102-103
Rites of the Blood Pg. 161-162

1.name: Map the Skies
1.description: Read the stars to determine your exact position
references: Libellus Sanguinis III: Wolves at the Door Pg. 68-70
Players Guide to the Low Clans Pg. 176-179

1.name: Maskim's Touch
1.description: Cause symptoms of influenza in a target
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 43-44

1.name: Sense the Ripples
1.description: Use the accumulated knowledge of the Heartsblood to become aware of future events
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 42

1.name: Song of Mercury
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 46

2.name: Breath of Ereshkigal
2.description: Breath upon a target, inflicting minor disease
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 43-44

2.name: Chameleon's Skin
2.description: Alter your skin and clothing to assume nearby coloring and texture

2.name: Curse of Heavenly Dolor
2.description: Curse a mortal to recoil from symbols of faith

2.name: Gift of Haqim
2.description: Make blood points drawn from the Heartsblood last longer
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 42

2.name: Grasp of the Mountain
2.description: Mystically enforce the grip on your weapon
references: Clanbook: Assamite Revised Pg. 74-76
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 441-442

2.name: Kessep
2.description: Sever one supernatural tie to a demon or spirit
references: The Black Hand: A Guide to the Tal'Mahe'Ra Pg. 86-87

2.name: Loss
2.description: Cause a victim to lose a valued piece of property
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 44-45
Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 102-103
Rites of the Blood Pg. 161-162

2.name: Read the Heaven’s Plans
2.description: See an omen of the future
references: Libellus Sanguinis III: Wolves at the Door Pg. 68-70
Players Guide to the Low Clans Pg. 176-179

2.name: Song of Venus
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 46

3.name: Call Down the Hunter’s Moon
3.description: Determine the best course of action for specific undertaking
references: Libellus Sanguinis III: Wolves at the Door Pg. 68-70
Players Guide to the Low Clans Pg. 176-179

3.name: Curse of Unfettered Rage
3.description: Curse a mortal to experience a Frenzy

3.name: Nergal's Blessing
3.description: Lessen the symptoms of a pathogenic illness
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 43-44

3.name: Peril
3.description: Cause a victim to suffer a dangerous accident
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 44-45
Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 102-103
Rites of the Blood Pg. 161-162

3.name: Pierce Steel's Skin
3.description: Direct your weapon to destroy any protective measures of the enemy
references: Clanbook: Assamite Revised Pg. 74-76
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 441-442

3.name: Song of Mars
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 46

3.name: Sotheq
3.description: Temporarily block all supernatural ties to a demon or spirit
references: The Black Hand: A Guide to the Tal'Mahe'Ra Pg. 86-87

3.name: The Distant Crimson
3.description: Use the Heartsblood to see through the eyes of any Assamite in a one hundred kilometer radius
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 42

3.name: Unassuming Pose
3.description: Blend in a crowd of people

4.name: Allah
4.description: Sever all supernatural pacts with a demon or spirit
references: The Black Hand: A Guide to the Tal'Mahe'Ra Pg. 86-87

4.name: Curse of Boundless Thirst
4.description: Curse a mortal to gain only sustenance from blood

4.name: Enemy
4.description: Cause a victim to lose Allies
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 44-45
Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 102-103
Rites of the Blood Pg. 161-162

4.name: Know the Fate of One
4.description: Use the Heartsblood to gain detailed knowledge of the fate of a chosen vampire
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 42

4.name: Nergal's Wrath
4.description: Inflict a disease of choice on a target
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 43-44

4.name: Razor's Shield
references: Clanbook: Assamite Revised Pg. 74-76
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 441-442

4.name: Song of Jupiter
4.description: Allows to resist Presence and similar attempts of emotional control
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 46

4.name: Trace the Soul’s Favor
4.description: Divine important aspects from a person whose birth date is known
references: Libellus Sanguinis III: Wolves at the Door Pg. 68-70
Players Guide to the Low Clans Pg. 176-179

5.name: Cast into the Pool of Blood
5.description: Use the Heartsblood to influence future events by either aiding or hindering vampires in the vicinity of the Heartsblood
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 42

5.name: Curse of Forbidden Sol
5.description: Curse a mortal to fear the sunlight like a vampire does

5.name: Ill Wind
5.description: Spread a disease simply through your nearby presence
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 43-44

5.name: Memo
5.description: Purge a target from all supernatural pacts, as well as learning to whom he was indebted
references: The Black Hand: A Guide to the Tal'Mahe'Ra Pg. 86-87

5.name: Ripples on the Sea of Stars
5.description: See parts of the world from aerial perspective
references: Libellus Sanguinis III: Wolves at the Door Pg. 68-70
Players Guide to the Low Clans Pg. 176-179

5.name: Song of Saturn
5.description: Inspire supernatural fear in an audience
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 46

5.name: Strike at the True Flesh
5.description: Bypass any supernatural protection in your attack
references: Clanbook: Assamite Revised Pg. 74-76

references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 44-45
